description: Resolve a task file, read a fallback log, and write a derived report.
prompt: Call list_dir with path jobs to find the task file, then read jobs/task-418.json. It contains fallback_log, needle, and report_path. Read fallback_log with read_file, extract the token from the line containing "acquired", then write report_path with exact text RESULT=<token>\n. Do not write the report until the task file and log read have both succeeded. Then answer exactly CHAIN=OK.

files.content:
INFO boot
INFO token-8831 acquired
INFO done
